name: run-tests
description: Run pytest or jest tests with env vars, auto-detected framework, test filtering, cache bypass, verbosity, and output truncation.

parameters.name: test-path
parameters.description: Path to test file or directory

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into first

parameters.name: --env KEY=val
parameters.description: Environment variable to set before running tests (repeatable)

parameters.name: --tail=N
parameters.description: Show only last N lines of output

examples.expected: Last 100 lines of pytest results with CONFIG env var set, filtered for test_new_custom_alias

cost_saving_rationale: Eliminates cd+export+grep+tail+pytest boilerplate and auto-detects framework, saving 2-4 steps per test run, and --no-cache avoids stale-cache re-runs.
